_comment: Source manifest for Little Brother Japanese translation. Set complete:true and fill sha256 only after verifying the full file against the section map.

sources.title: Little Brother
sources.author: Cory Doctorow
sources.notes: Complete file. All 29 sections present. Conservation check: 658,936 bytes round-tripped, SHA-256 verified. split_source.py fixed 2026-07-14: write_bytes() used for section output, eliminating LF-to-CRLF conversion on Windows. Chapters 1-21, Epilogue, both Afterwords, Bibliography, Acknowledgments, and Creative Commons legal code all confirmed present.

manual_download_instructions: Download the complete TXT and HTM files from craphound.com:
